title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements that make OpsPal more reliable for daily RevOps work. The platform now automatically detects and prevents common Salesforce configuration errors, like adding invisible fields when Dynamic Forms is active and missing record type assignments that cause workflow failures. Additionally, OpsPal now runs smoother with better plugin management and fewer startup issues.

entries.headline: Platform runs cleaner with better background management
details: Improved startup process removes unnecessary components and organizes background tasks more efficiently

entries.headline: Prevents common Salesforce configuration errors
details: Automatically detects when Dynamic Forms is active and prevents adding invisible fields to your pages
Assigns new record types to System Administrator profile to prevent workflow failures
Converts blocking routing errors into helpful warnings so your work continues smoothly

entries.headline: Automatically fixes missing components during startup
details: Platform detects and installs missing components in the background
Shows clear error messages and fix instructions when automatic repair fails

entries.headline: Eliminates false error about missing components
